name: story-tracker
description: Browser extension for tracking reading progress across novel and manga sites

scripts.dev:local: node scripts/prepare-env.mjs local && vite build --watch --mode development
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:firefox && npm run build:firefox:dev && npm run build:chrome
scripts.build: npm run build:firefox && npm run build:chrome
scripts.build:firefox: npm run prepare-env:prod && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && cross-env TARGET=firefox vite build
scripts.build:firefox:dev: npm run prepare-env:prod && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && cross-env TARGET=firefox-dev vite build && node scripts/validate-manifest.mjs
scripts.build:firefox:dev:local: npm run prepare-env local && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && cross-env TARGET=firefox-dev vite build && node scripts/validate-manifest.mjs
scripts.build:chrome: npm run prepare-env:prod && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && cross-env TARGET=chrome vite build
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run package && npm run build:firefox:dev && npm run package:firefox:dev
scripts.release:store: npm run build:firefox && npm run build:chrome && npm run package
